dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time tracking and statistical overviews for Taiwan Lottery games.

analysis.title: Statistical Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Deep dive into historical number frequencies, gaps, and distributions using real Taiwanese lottery data.
analysis.no_data: No data available for this game yet. Run the seeder and refresh.

predictions.title: Advanced Predictions
predictions.subtitle: The Trio Strategy engine analyzing historical data to output Alpha, Beta, and Gamma statistical models.
predictions.no_data: Unable to load historical data for predictions.
predictions.alpha_justification: Selected around the distribution center (Expected uniform mean: {mean}). Avoids statistical outliers.
predictions.alpha_risk: Low Risk: Favors regression to the mean.
predictions.beta_justification: Targets High-Momentum (Hot) numbers appearing most frequently in the last {history} draws.
predictions.beta_risk: Medium Risk: Rides current wave/streak momentum.
predictions.gamma_justification: Contrarian Black Swan selection. Targets the most overdue / cold numbers awaiting anomaly correction.
predictions.gamma_risk: High Risk: Pure mathematical chaos / Cold number convergence.

history.title: Draw History
history.subtitle: View the 50 most recent confirmed draws for the selected lottery game.

picker.title: Number Picker Wheel
picker.subtitle: It is a simple tool to cover every possible pair of 12 to 16 numbers in just a few tickets. Your chances of success in winning will be increased by using this tool.
picker.step1_desc: Pick your luckiest numbers from the grid below. You must select at least 12 numbers and up to 16 numbers to create the combinatorial wheel.
picker.step2_desc: You have selected {count} numbers. You can change how they are sorted before rolling the tickets.
picker.step3_desc: Choose how many tickets you want the wheeling algorithm to generate for you using only your selected numbers.
picker.result_title: Total number of {count} tickets were generated from your number selections are listed below:
